design_philosophy: Klassisch-professionell (hell, blau-weiß, vertrauenserweckend). Clean lines, high trust, premium automotive feel using a stark white and blue-slate palette.

typography.rules: Tight tracking on large headings (tracking-tighter), normal/loose tracking on body for high legibility. German UI copy requires good horizontal space.

layout_and_spacing.card_style: Flat surface, 1px border (#E2E8F0), no shadow by default, hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

components.navigation: Crystal Glass style. Sticky top, bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200. Contains logo, links, and primary CTA. `z-50`.
components.hero_section: Generous spacing. Large text-5xl md:text-6xl+ heading in Deep Navy. Hero image should be a massive rounded container. Search bar MUST be prominent: floating Glassmorphism or solid white card over the hero image bottom edge.
components.search_bar: Solid white background, flex row (wrap on mobile), divided inputs (Standort, Abholdatum, Rückgabedatum), large primary search button. 1px border (border-slate-200), shadow-md.
components.car_card: Solid white card, 1px border (border-slate-200), rounded-lg. Top half: high-quality car image (aspect-video, object-cover). Bottom half: details (Icon + Text for specs like seats, transmission, fuel). Bottom edge: Price calculation and Book CTA. Left-aligned content.
components.stepper_form: Clear horizontal progress bar (Datum -> Extras -> Daten -> Zahlung). Large text for current step. Form fields must use customized Shadcn inputs (border-slate-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary).
components.admin_dashboard: Sidebar layout. Dense data view (Swiss/Archetype 4 style). Solid backgrounds, 1px borders. `gap-4` or `gap-6` for stat widgets. Recharts for revenue/statistics, sharp edges.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0055FF] text-white rounded hover:bg-[#0044CC] font-semibold tracking-wide transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0A192F] border border-slate-300 rounded hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors

hero_image.description: Dynamic shot of a white sedan driving on an open road, perfect for the main hero background.

car_catalog_example.description: Side view of a sleek white luxury sedan parked outdoors, used as a placeholder for vehicle catalog.

interior_feature.description: Modern car interior with leather seats, for detail pages.

testimonial_user.description: Business man driving, good for target audience representation or testimonials.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text color meets APCA/WCAG ratios. Focus rings (`focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary`) are mandatory for forms.
accessibility_and_testing.motion: Use smooth transitions (transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease) on hover/focus.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI entirely in German as requested (e.g., 'Autovermietung', 'Fahrzeug finden', 'Standort', 'Abholdatum').
Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' or 'Outfit' for headings, and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Load them via Google Fonts or next/font.
Implement the landing page hero with a prominent floating search bar overlapping the hero image bottom edge.
Use standard Shadcn UI components but heavily customize spacing (more generous padding) and remove default heavy shadows. Prefer 1px borders (Swiss style) for cards and widgets.
Ensure the Admin dashboard uses a denser, highly functional grid layout suited for data management.
Integrate Lucide React icons for vehicle specs (users, gauge, map-pin, calendar).
